crackTheCodeGuessAlreadyTried: You have already tried this guess.
crackTheCodeGameWonMessage: Congratulations! You found the secret code!
crackTheCodeInstructions:
How to play

The goal of the game is to guess a secret code made of 4 digits.

  • Click "Start" to begin a new game.
  • Enter a combination of 4 digits.
  • Click "Submit" to make a guess.
  • After each attempt, you receive feedback:
    • Correct Place: correct digit in the correct position
    • Wrong Place: correct digit but in the wrong position
  • Use this feedback to refine your next guesses.
  • You win when you find the correct combination.

The number of attempts and elapsed time help track your performance.

Good luck!
guessTheNumberGameWonMessage: Congratulations! You found the secret number!
guessTheNumberInstructions:
How to play

The goal of the game is to guess a randomly generated secret number.

  • Click "Start" to begin a new game.
  • Enter a number made of several digits.
  • Click "Submit" to make a guess.
  • After each attempt, you will receive a hint telling you if the secret number is:
    • lower than your guess
    • greater than your guess
  • Use these hints to get closer to the correct number.
  • You win when you guess the exact secret number.

The number of attempts and elapsed time help track your performance.

Good luck!
memoryInstructions:
How to play

The goal of the game is to find all matching pairs of cards.

  • Click "Start" to begin a new game.
  • Flip two cards by clicking on them.
  • If the cards match, they remain visible.
  • If not, they are flipped back face down.
  • Remember the card positions to find pairs more easily.
  • The game ends when all pairs are found.

The number of attempts and elapsed time help measure your performance.

Good luck!
simonInstructions:
How to play

The goal of the game is to memorize and reproduce a sequence of colors that gets longer with each level.

  • Click "Start" to begin the game.
  • Watch the sequence carefully.
  • Repeat the sequence by clicking the tiles in the correct order.
  • Each level adds a new color to the sequence.
  • If you make a mistake, the game is over.

You can pause the game at any time and enable or disable sound.

Good luck!
